articles.title: FG unveils compensation scheme for injured, deceased civil servants
articles.excerpt:
The Nigerian government has launched a new civil servant compensation scheme to support workers affected by work-related injuries, diseases, or death.

Read More: https://punchng.com/fg-unveils-compensation-scheme-for-injured-deceased-civil-servants/
